title: May 11th, 2019 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
    - professional
        - new wings and things lyrics
            - it's not that it's ok that i'm doing it
            - who knows? this road might be ruinous
            - but it's alright that i'm trying out
            - new wings and things to flow with the forces that fly around
            - from the wind to the wait and the way it wears me down
            - quiet for a second, got a present that i gotta flip my mind around
            - try it, it's a riot til you find the ground
        - say something lyrics
            - don't matter if i say it, i can see it
            - the way i see it i'm a be it if i want it
            - and i'm on it
        - random lines lyrics
            - i ain't beyond saying i'm destiny's child
            - my bricks are made of shit mud spit and sticks
            - y'all scared uh mud cuz you ain't tryin to stick together
            - i dig for mine to build bricks so i can spit shit stick and twine this bridge to get there
    - professional
